name: com.naverlabs.vlsdk
description: Unity package that provides seamless integration with ARC eye's Visual Localization (VL) API, enabling developers to easily implement advanced AR positioning and tracking capabilities in their Unity applications.

samples.description: A simple example of how to use VLSDK.
An example of how to use ARDataset in VLSDK. Before running this example, make sure to import the `ARDataset Player` sample.
An example of how to use CustomPoseTracker in VLSDK.
A package used to play ARDataset datasets.
A package used to create ARDataset datasets.
